title: CS Knifes
description: This resource pack makes swords be CS knifes.
body:
# CS Knifes
This resource pack changes your swords into knifes from CS. Here is a couple of the features:
- Actual skins: it, very obviously, replaces the swords with knife skins from CS.
- "_George, language!_ ": changes parts of your language (English, US in specific) to have knife names and colors, for a preview of that go to the gallery.
- HD knifes: this isn't low quality knife PNGs, these are 512x512 pictures that are adapted to look like a sword (rotation)


This resource pack may support older and newer versions because of the simplistic file structure. If you are playing on a non-supported version, you can still try to install it.
